zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada De Baliol於1246年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，她的父親John de Balliol11243歲，母親Devorguilla of Galloway36歲。她於大約1266年6月與William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1304年在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾藍波頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada De Baliol于1246年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，她的父亲John de Balliol11243岁，母亲Devorguilla of Galloway36岁。她于大约1266年6月与William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1304年在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾藍波頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada De Baliol was born in 1246, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, John de Balliol, was 11243 and her mother, Devorguilla of Galloway, was 36. She married William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton about June 1266, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1304, in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada De Baliol est née en 1246, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John de Balliol, avait 11243 ans et sa mère, Devorguilla of Galloway, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton environ juin 1266, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1304, à Lamberton, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada De Baliol 1246 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Balliol 11243 und ihre Mutter Devorguilla of Galloway 36. Sie hat um Juni 1266 in Scotland William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1304 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada De Baliol è nata il nel 1246 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, John de Balliol, aveva 11243 anni e sua madre, Devorguilla of Galloway, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton circa giugno 1266, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1304, nel Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada De Baliolが1246年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Balliolは11243歳，母Devorguilla of Gallowayは36歳であった。約1266年6月にスコットランドでWilliam de Lindsay - Lord of Lambertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1304年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアランバートンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada De Baliol(이)가 1246년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Balliol(은)는 11243세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Devorguilla of Galloway(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1266년 6월 스컷랜드에서 William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1304년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 램르턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada De Baliol nasceu em 1246, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John de Balliol, tinha 11243 anos e sua mãe, Devorguilla of Galloway, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton aproximadamente junho de 1266, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1304, em Lamberton, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada De Baliol родилась в 1246 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John de Balliol было 11243 года, а матери, которую звали Devorguilla of Galloway, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton около июнь 1266 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1304 г. в местности лэмбиртон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ada De Baliol nació en 1246, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John de Balliol, tenía 11243 años y su mamá, Devorguilla of Galloway, tenía 36 años. Se casó con William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton aproximadamente junio de 1266, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1304, en Lamberton, Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
